TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Brian_Andrews_(actor), title = Brian_Andrews_(actor), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Brian_Andrews_(actor)} }

S.FORM: Brian Andrews hiya ga m'engi. t'aring sa kawas 1970, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na engi ru mqwas. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Brian Andrews hiya ga m'engi. t'aring sa kawas 1970, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na engi ru mqwas. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: βrian an*rews~ɕ ħija ɣa mʔeŋi. tʔariŋ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na eŋi ru mqwas~ɕ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
